label: systemctl status
description: Preserve unit status, active state, and journal errors.

tests.name: inline sample
tests.input:
Loaded: loaded (/etc/systemd/system/app.service)
Active: failed (Result: exit-code)
Main PID: 123
May 1 app[123]: error boot failed
tests.expected:
Loaded: loaded (/etc/systemd/system/app.service)
Active: failed (Result: exit-code)
Main PID: 123
May 1 app[123]: error boot failed
